name: Somagic
message: The Somagic is a French company in the production of solid-fuel barbecues and barbecues, the company was founded in 1981. The main office of the company is located at 1 A Rd 975 Cs 20010, La Gente, Bourgogne-Franche-Comte, 71290, France. The credit of this company itself and top management was the worst among the we made deals this year.
